{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Glasswater Sentinel
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Glasswater Sentinel]] is a transparent [[construct]] crafted by [[Soulsmith Serenity]] of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
